verdicts.description: Install the front wheel assembly, left side: assemble the stack in order wheel, washer, acorn nut; tighten to firm finger torque.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Left front stack assembled wheel-washer-acorn nut with washer present and acorn nut at firm finger torque.
verdicts.reasoning: Left front stack assembled in the correct order with washer present and acorn nut finger-tightened at 00:00:40.

verdicts.description: Install the front wheel assembly, right side: assemble the stack in order wheel, washer, acorn nut; tighten to firm finger torque.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Right front stack assembled wheel-washer-acorn nut with washer present and acorn nut at firm finger torque.
verdicts.reasoning: Right front stack assembled correctly with washer present and acorn nut finger-tightened at 00:01:15.

verdicts.description: Install the rear pulley on the rear axle first, then assemble each rear stack wheel, washer, acorn nut.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Rear pulley installed before the rear wheels and seated on the rear axle.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker installs the magenta rear pulley on the rear axle before fitting any rear wheel at 00:01:55.

verdicts.description: Complete both rear wheel stacks: wheel, washer, acorn nut on each side; tighten to firm finger torque.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Both rear stacks fully assembled with wheel, washer and acorn nut on each side.
verdicts.reasoning: The right rear wheel is omitted entirely: the acorn nut is run down onto the washer with no wheel in the stack. A missing wheel is a documented error mode requiring the complete stack to be rebuilt and the chapter 6 audit repeated.

verdicts.description: Fastener and hardware audit: all four pins correct type, correct orientation, fully seated.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: All four silver pins confirmed correct type and orientation and fully seated.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker checks each of the four pins with hands clear at 00:03:30; all are correct type, correctly oriented and fully seated.

verdicts.description: Fastener and hardware audit: front bracket secured by the screw (not a nut), fully tightened.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Front bracket fastener confirmed to be the threaded screw, not an acorn nut, and fully tightened.
verdicts.reasoning: Head-shape check confirms the front bracket is secured by the threaded screw, fully tightened, at 00:04:05.

verdicts.description: State verification: verify the complete vehicle component by component against the strip (state 13), hands clear.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Every component at 1 except the short rear chassis (0); build matches the state-13 acceptance strip with no mismatch.
verdicts.reasoning: The build does not reach state 13: the rear wheel assembly component fails because the right rear wheel is missing (STEP-004). Acceptance criterion not met; the unit must not be released and is quarantined per chapter 8.
